system.description:
The psyker shapes the force of his mind into a blade of destructive force. Counts as a sword — no Weapon Training Talent required. Strikes with a WS Test. The weapon may be parried but is not destroyed by Power Field weapons. Damage: 1d10 Rending + 1 per Psy Rating. Penetration equals Psy Rating.

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Force Bolt

XP Cost: 200
